programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A Enterprise continua sua jornada pela galáxia com o nascimento de um novo membro. Picard mais uma vez lidera a tripulação enquanto civilizações desconhecidas notam a nave e desejam saber mais sobre a tripulação e suas operações.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Kira tem de lidar com um teimoso fazendeiro que se recusa a deixar sua casa, mesmo ela estando destinada à demolição.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A Deep Space Nine é colocada em perigo quando os pensamentos da tripulação se manifestam, e figuras como Rumpelstiltskin aparecem.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A Embaixadora da Federação de Betazed, Lwaxana Troi, visita a estação, porém desenvolve uma afeição por Odo.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Uma nave klingon emerge do buraco de minhoca e explode. Depois disso, um motim começa, com Kira na liderança.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Um visitante cardassiano pode ser na verdade um notório criminoso de guerra, e Kira está determinada a desmascará-lo.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A fricção aumenta quando Winn Adami chega na Deep Space Nine e descobre que a professora Keiko O'Brien não está ensinando sobre os alienígenas do buraco de minhoca.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Kira resgata um prisioneiro de guerra bajoriano; enquanto isso, um grupo extremista chamado o Círculo começa a controlar Bajor.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: O Círculo tenta derrubar o governo bajoriano, porém há mais na situação do que parece.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko e Li Nalas tentam impedir que a Deep Space Nine seja comandada pelos bajorianos, enquanto Kira e Dax tentam colocar um fim no Círculo.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Com apenas o pessoal necessário a bordo da Deep Space Nine, um trill não juntado e sua equipe assumem o controle da estação e tentam roubar o simbionte Dax de Jadzia.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Garak investiga a identidade de um menino cardassiano abandonado em Bajor, que foi criado pelos bajorianos.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Bashir tenta ajudar a Alferes Melora a se adaptar à gravidade "normal".

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Quark representa o Grande Nagus Zek em uma trama para estabelecer a presença de um negócio ferengi no Quadrante Gama.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Quando Quark é baleado, Odo reabre um caso de assassinato de cinco anos atrás.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Uma misteriosa mulher rouba o olho de Sisko em um de seus encontros transitórios.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Uma misteriosa mulher rouba o olho de Sisko em um de seus encontros transitórios.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Fazendeiros humanoides deslocados do Quadrante Gama afirmam que Bajor é sua terra lendária, Kentanna.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Fazendeiros humanoides deslocados do Quadrante Gama afirmam que Bajor é sua terra lendária, Kentanna.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Quark se sente ameaçado quando um charmoso vigarista abre um bar concorrente, auxiliado por um dispositivo que lhe dá boa sorte.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Quark se sente ameaçado quando um charmoso vigarista abre um bar concorrente, auxiliado por um dispositivo que lhe dá boa sorte.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Um cientista encontra uma forma de vida no Quadrante game que pode ser aparentada com Odo.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Um cientista encontra uma forma de vida no Quadrante game que pode ser aparentada com Odo.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Bashir e O'Brien trabalham para livrar duas raças alienígenas de armas mortais, sem saber que seus anfitriões pretendem sacrificá-los como parte do processo de paz.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Bashir e O'Brien trabalham para livrar duas raças alienígenas de armas mortais, sem saber que seus anfitriões pretendem sacrificá-los como parte do processo de paz.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Enquanto prepara a estação para discussões de paz, O'Brien descobre que a tripulação tem lhe escondido informações e dado ordens por suas costas.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Enquanto prepara a estação para discussões de paz, O'Brien descobre que a tripulação tem lhe escondido informações e dado ordens por suas costas.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko e O'Brien ficam presos em um planeta cujo líder da população local rejeita quaisquer formas de tecnologia, mesmo se isso significar a morte.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko e O'Brien ficam presos em um planeta cujo líder da população local rejeita quaisquer formas de tecnologia, mesmo se isso significar a morte.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Odo e Dax investigam o desaparecimento de vários residentes de uma cidade.

programme.desc: Um proto universo ameaça destruir a estação e Bajor.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Quark reencontra sua antiga paixão, descobrindo que ela está envolvida em uma perigosa intriga política.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain explores the vibrant, dynamic city of Shanghai.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Sherlock Homes: El globo verde
programme.desc: Un globo llega flotando hasta la casa de Holmes, con un mensaje de auxilio. Por los vientos y el tiempo que tarda en deshincharse, él deduce que la procedencia es una pequeña isla lejos de la costa.

programme.title: Sherlock Homes: La estatua robada
programme.desc: Moriarty roba una importante estatua de oro que coronaba una torre. Decide esconderla en viejo barco abandonado a orillas del Támesis, para ir a recuperarla cuando la investigación policial cese.

programme.title: Sherlock Homes: La rica heredera
programme.desc: Miss Ellen regresa desde América a la casa donde vivió de pequeña, a la espera de que su prometido regrese también. En la casa encuentra a su primo Roylott y dos criados, que no son otros que Moriarty y sus secuaces disfrazados.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: Sakura y la extraña predicción
programme.desc: Sakura acude con su familia a la visita de Año Nuevo al santuario Tsukimine. Se encuentra con Tomoyo y van a buscar la suerte. Sakura elige la suya que dice: "La verdad puede encontrarse en tu primer sueño del año”

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: Sakura, la piscina y la ola gigante
programme.sub-title: Sakura, la piscina y la ola gigante
programme.desc: Sakura y los demás van a pasar el día a la piscina de olas. De repente, empieza a formarse una ola enorme y Rika corre peligro de ahogarse. Tomoyo le sugiere a Sakura que utilice su magia invocando la Carta del Agua y consigue salvar a Rika.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: Sakura y la clase de esquí
programme.sub-title: Sakura y la clase de esquí
programme.desc: Sakura y sus compañeros van de excursión a una estación de esquí. Sakura sube a la montaña para esquiar en una pista más difícil, pero una tormenta de nieve les sorprende y una avalancha amenaza a los que están en el albergue.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: Sakura, Yukito y el poder de la desaparición
programme.sub-title: Sakura, Yukito y el poder de la desaparición
programme.desc: Durante la grabación de una sesión de cine del instituto, Yukito se desmaya. Los poderes mágicos de Sakura no son suficientes para salvar a Yue…

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: La persona que más le gusta a Sakura
programme.sub-title: La persona que más le gusta a Sakura
programme.desc: Sakura y los demás asisten a la proyección de la película. Al final de la proyección, todos alaban la actuación de Sakura, pero ella se siente cada vez más angustiada por declarar su amor a Yukito y conocer sus sentimientos.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: Sakura, Shaoran y Tsukimine
programme.desc: Sakura invita a Shaoran al festival del santuario Tsukimine, pero la niña no para de bostezar. Shaoran, preocupado por ella, descubre que lleva varias noches tejiendo una bufanda para el, en agradecimiento a su comprensión y amistad.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: Sakura, el pasado y el Abu Clow
programme.sub-title: Sakura, el pasado y el Abu Clow
programme.desc: Sakura vuelve a tener los extraños sueños del pasado, en los que preguntaba a Clow Reed por el futuro. Sakura, decide retroceder en el tiempo para encontrarse con Clow Reed, mientras sus amigos la vigilan.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: Sakura se encuentra con el Abu Clow
programme.sub-title: Sakura se encuentra con el Abu Clow
programme.desc: Eriol espera el regreso de Sakura al pasado. Al igual que en su extraño sueño, Eriol sumerge al mundo en una profunda oscuridad, y duerme a todos los habitantes de la ciudad.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: Sakura y sus verdaderos sentimientos
programme.desc: Sakura recibe ayuda de Kero, Yue y Shaoran y consigue despertar a las personas que Eriol durmió. Pero antes de desaparecer, Eriol deja la siguiente nota: "Te lo explicaré todo, venid mañana a mi casa".

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: Sakura y el misterioso libro mágico
programme.sub-title: Sakura y el misterioso libro mágico
programme.desc: Sakura Kinomoto es una colegiala de 10 años que vive con su padre y su hermano mayor. Su madre, Nadeshiko, murió cuando ella tenía tres años.Un día Sakura oye ruidos extraños en la biblioteca del sótano. Allí encuentra el misterioso "Libro de Clow" …

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: La maravillosa amiga de Sakura
programme.desc: Últimamente ocurren cosas extrañas en la escuela de Sakura. Alguien está destrozando las instalaciones. Una noche, Sakura, Kero y Tomoyo van a la escuela para investigar. Tal y como pensaba Sakura, el culpable es el espíritu de una carta de Clow.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: La emocionante primera cita de Sakura
programme.sub-title: La emocionante primera cita de Sakura
programme.desc: Durante la excursión escolar al acuario, Sakura descubre el espíritu de la carta Agua. Además, hoy está contenta porque tiene una cita con Yukito, el amigo de su hermano. Pero un extraño incidente le hace regresar al lugar por la noche con Kero y Tomoyo.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: El agotador domingo de Sakura
programme.desc: Un dia, mientras Sakura limpia la casa, se encuentra en el sotano con dos cartas de Clow, que están ya ejerciendo su magia y convierten la casa en una selva. Sakura consigue atraparlas con ayuda de otras cartas.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: Sakura, el panda y la tienda maravillosa
programme.sub-title: Sakura, el panda y la tienda maravillosa
programme.desc: Sakura y sus amigas conocen a Miki Matsumoto, la dueña de una tienda de regalos. Poco después de que Chiharu compre un peluche en esta tienda, unos ladrones se lo roban. Corre el rumor de que todo aquel que compre algo en Twin Bell sufrirá un robo seguro.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: Sakura y los recuerdos de su madre
programme.sub-title: Sakura y los recuerdos de su madre
programme.desc: Sakura y los demás van a la colina que hay detrás de la escuela para comprobar el rumor de avistamientos de fantasmas. Pero en lugar de un fantasma, aparece la figura de la madre de Sakura.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: La primera batalla de Sakura contra un misterioso ladrón
programme.sub-title: La primera batalla de Sakura contra un misterioso ladrón
programme.desc: En la excursión al Museo de Arte, Sakura se da cuenta de que un niño está causando alboroto delante de un cuadro. En ese momento, Sakura percibe que no oye nada. Sospechando que se trate de una Carta de Clow…

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: El rival de Sakura
programme.desc: Un chico nuevo llamado Shaoran, se une a la clase de Sakura. Curiosamente, Shaoran también colecciona las cartas de Clow.

programme.title: Air Gear: El inicio
programme.desc: Miniami"Ikki" Itsuki es un estudiante (y delincuente). Se hace llamar el "invencible Baby face". Ikki es el líder de la banda del lado Este. Pero un día cuando va de vuelta a casa, es atacado por unos patinadores llamados Skull Saders.

programme.title: Air Gear: Soy un genio
programme.desc: Miniami"Ikki" Itsuki es un estudiante (y delincuente). Se hace llamar el "invencible Baby face". Ikki es el líder de la banda del lado Este. Pero un día cuando va de vuelta a casa, es atacado por unos patinadores llamados Skull Saders.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: Sakura y el broche misterioso
programme.desc: Sakura se siente triste por sus habilidades como Cazadora de Cartas, así que Tomoyo y Rika la llevan de compras para animarla. En cuanto Rika se pone un broche con forma de espada, el espíritu de una carta se apodera de ella y se vuelve contra Sakura.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: El campeonato y las flores
programme.desc: Hoy es el día del deporte en la escuela y Sakura conoce a la madre de Tomoyo, y descubre que su padre también la conoce, aunque parece que hay cierto resquemor entre ellos.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: Sakura, Tomoyo y la gran mansión
programme.sub-title: Sakura, Tomoyo y la gran mansión
programme.desc: Sakura visita a Tomoyo que le pide ayuda para abrir su caja de tesoros atascada. Dentro encuentran el ramo de flores de cerezo que llevaba la madre de Sakura el día de su boda, y la posesión más querida de Tomoyo: una goma de borrar que le regaló Sakura.

programme.title: Cardcaptor Sakura ES: El día interminable de Sakura

programme.title: Recién Casados... No Molestar
programme.desc: Catalina y Andres son una joven pareja a punto de casarse. Cada uno tiene su despedida de soltero con sus amigos y amigas respectivamente, donde intentan hacerles ver los pros y los contras del matrimonio con un poco de satira.

credits.actor: Rafael Banquells Manuel Calvo Fernando Cortes Mapy Cortes Pedro Elviro Angel Garasa Ramon Gay Conchita Gentil Arcos Prudencia Grifell Ismael Larumbe Tana Lynn Miguel Angel López Gloria Mange Angel Merino Anita Muriel

programme.title: Si Volvieras A Mi
programme.desc: Pedro cuenca, medico de profesión, se muda con su amigo y colega el doctor montes roca para llevar a cabo su ano de residencia como médico rural. Allí conoce a la hija de su anfitrión, la bella Alejandra.

programme.title: Viva El Amor
programme.desc: Una joven bella y liberada francesa decide tener un amorio con un hombre casado e ir con el a la habana, pero le exige a su compañero que pida su divorcio. Su esposa le pide a su vez que, para aceptar, debe conocer a su amante; asi que la lleva ante ella.

programme.title: Yo Soy Muy Macho
programme.desc: Mario es un piloto que recibe una notificacion de sus superiores para pilotear un avion hacia la selva y transportar medicinas. Lamentablemente mario es detenido por golpear a dos policias y chocar un coche.

programme.title: Ahí viene Martín Corona
programme.desc: Martín Corona (Pedro Infante) y "Piporro" son campeones de los pobres, los desafortunados, y las mujeres, pero Carmen Linares y Rosario Medina no caen por su carisma.

programme.title: Cuando Habla El Corazon
programme.desc: Historia que demuestra la amistad entre dos amigos, que a lo largo de los años se demuestran que hay que ser valientes y leales. Tratando de defender a su amada, pero también a la fiel a la amistad que se deben.

credits.actor: Miguel Del Campo María Luisa Zea
Cruz De Niño Arturo Soto Rangel

programme.title: Cuidado con el Amor
programme.desc: Pedro, con la ayuda de dos mejores amigos de su padre busca un Tesoro enterrado en una hacienda colonial. Elsa y su madre quieren impedirlo. Al fin el amor interviene y Pedro y Elsa comparten la fortuna y su felicidad.

programme.title: El Enamorado
programme.desc: Martin Corona encuentra el amor y promote a su esposa a no volver a usar armas, hasta que sus enemigos lo obligan a volver a luchar, ahora por defender a su propia familia.

programme.title: La Vida de Pedro Infante
programme.desc: Una historia emotiva y tierna basada en la vida real de Pedro Infante, el cantante y actor más famoso de México. Sus comienzos, sus triunfos, su pasión por los aviones, sus amores y su trágica muerte en plena flor de su edad.

programme.title: iCarly: iGoodbye - Parte 1
programme.desc: Carly vorrebbe andare alla tradizionale festa "padri-figlie" che si tiene in una base militare di Seattle, dove suo padre la portava sempre quand'era una bambina...

programme.title: iCarly: iGoodbye - Parte 2
programme.desc: Carly è terribilmente delusa dalla piega che hanno preso gli eventi. Freddie e Gibby si offrono di accompagnarla alla festa ma lei rifiuta, inconsolabile. Proprio in quel momento però...

programme.title: iCarly: iPilot
programme.desc: Carly si occupa dello show della scuola. Subito si diffonde una grande clamore. Così Carly e i suoi amici decidono di creare uno show di intrattenimento settimanale.

programme.title: iCarly: Io amo Jake
programme.desc: Carly è eccitata per il fatto che Jake, il ragazzo di cui è innamorata, abbia acconsentito a cantare all'interno del loro webcast.

programme.title: iCarly: Io voglio più visitatori
programme.desc: Carly e Sam sfidano Freddie e Spencer in una gara su chi riesce ad attrarre il maggior numero di spettatori nello show. Tutti impazziscono quando i ragazzi mettono in atto i loro piani.

programme.title: iCarly: Io e Nevel
programme.desc: Carly, Sam e Freddie vorrebbero che il loro show fosse recensito. Carly rischia di ricevere una cattiva pubblicità quando insulta il supponente ragazzino undicenne che gestisce un popolare sito che dà i voti ai siti web.

programme.title: iCarly: Voglio stare con Spencer
programme.desc: Il nonno di Carly arriva per una visita ma è colpito dall'insolito comportamento di Spencer, cosicchè contesta la capacità di Spencer di sentirsi responsabile. Carly deve convincerlo che Spencer è in grado di fare il custode.

programme.title: iCarly: Intrappolati in casa Briggs
programme.desc: Il tema per il prossimo webcast di iCarly è capire che cosa significa fare gli insegnanti al di fuori della scuola. Quando Carly e Freddie seguono la signora Briggs, essi rimangono bloccati dentro la sua casa.

programme.title: iCarly: Un record da battere
programme.desc: Carly, Sam e Freddie vogliono battere il precedente record del mondo della più lunga trasmissione web in diretta, che è di poco più di 24 ore. L'impresa si rivela tutt'altro che facile.

programme.title: iCarly: Un appuntamento per Freddy
programme.desc: Valerie, una ragazza dalla scuola, mostra interesse per Freddie, così i due si fidanzano. La ragazza cerca di strappare via Freddie da iCarly per realizzare un suo webcast e cosìCerca anche di reclutare Sam.

programme.title: iCarly: L'arte nel cuore
programme.desc: Spencer si deprime e smette di interessarsi di arte dopo che il suo idolo critica il suo lavoro. Carly cerca di alleviare la sua delusione mostrando alcune delle sculture di Spencer nello show.

programme.title: iCarly: Io sono la vostra più grande fan
programme.sub-title: Io sono la vostra più grande fan
programme.desc: Carly invita il suo più grande fan ad assistere a una registrazione live di iCarly, ma la ragazza è così ossessionata che non riescono a sbarazzarsi di lei.

programme.title: iCarly: Pulcini da salvare
programme.desc: Carly e Sam devono fare una ricerca scolastica e scelgono di far schiudere in casa delle uova. L'argomento sembra interessante e le ragazze decidono anche di mostrare su iCarly l'intero processo che porterà alla nascita dei pulcini.

programme.title: iCarly: Il litigio
programme.desc: Carly regala a Sam una maglietta che ha creato apposta per lei, con il logo di iCarly e le loro facce sopra. Sam, per ricambiare, vorrebbe regalarle i biglietti per il concerto di un gruppo.

programme.title: iCarly: Il sogno di ballare
programme.desc: Per i loro balletti, Carly e Sam prendono ispirazione dai video inviati dai fans del loro web show. Carly si divincola in modo maldestro in sogno con il suo affascinante partner.

programme.title: iCarly: La notte di Halloween
programme.desc: Carly, Sam e Freddie trasmettono il loro webcast di Halloween da un appartamento che si dice essere abitato dai fantasmi.

programme.title: iCarly: Il sabotaggio
programme.desc: I Plain White T's devono suonare ad iCarly, ma Nevel progetta di sabotare l'evento facendo hackeraggio sul sito.

programme.title: iCarly: La punizione
programme.desc: Sam viene punita dal professor Horward, il più tremendo di tutto l'istituto, ed è costretta a tornare la sera a scuola, proprio il giorno in cui deve andare in onda la 50esima puntata di ICarly.

programme.title: iCarly: Uno sponsor per iCarly
programme.desc: Un'azienda produttrice di scarpe chiede a Carly, Sam e Freddie di lanciare nella loro trasmissione web un nuovo modello di scarpe da tennis, molto trendy e tecnologiche.

programme.title: iCarly: La promessa
programme.desc: Carly ottiene una B nel compito di storia e si intristisce perchè pensa di meritare di più. Sam penetra nel computer della scuola per modificare il voto e così va tutto a posto, finchè Carly si trova a dover fare i conti con la propria coscienza.

programme.title: iCarly: Va in TV
programme.desc: Visto il successo che iCarly riscuote sul web, il funzionario di un'emittente televisiva contatta i ragazzi e propone loro di trasferire gli episodi in televisione.

programme.title: iCarly: L'odioso ragazzo di Sam
programme.desc: Quando la nuova relazione di Sam inizia a influire negativamente sullo show, Carly e Freddie fanno di tutto per far sì che Sam e il suo nuovo fidanzato si lascino.

programme.title: iCarly: L'appostamento
programme.desc: La polizia di Seattle è sulle tracce di un venditore di DVD pirata che compare per caso in una delle trasmissioni di iCarly. Due poliziotti organizzano un appostamento nell'appartamento di Carly.

programme.title: iCarly: Scuola nuova, amici nuovi
programme.desc: Carly riceve un invito per un colloquio con la preside della Briarwood, una scuola costosa e rinomata.

programme.title: iCarly: Scherma e schermaglie
programme.desc: Nonostante Freddie si diverta a passare il tempo libero con Carly e Sam a realizzare il web-show, sente l'esigenza di stare anche con dei ragazzi e fare cose da "maschi".

programme.title: iCarly: Vinci un incontro galante
programme.desc: Gibby è segretamente innamorato di Shannon, ma sa che non riuscirà mai a conquistarla, perché a lei piace Freddie.

programme.title: iCarly: Carly va in Giappone - parte 1
programme.desc: Il web show iCarly è stato nominato agli International iWeb Awards. Carly, Sam e Freddie partono alla volta del Giappone accompagnati da Spencer e dalla madre di Freddie.

programme.title: iCarly: Carly va in Giappone - parte 2
programme.desc: Salvati da un poliziotto, Carly e i suoi amici arrivano in albergo. Qui incontrano Kyoko e Yuki, due ragazzi il cui web show è in lizza per lo stesso premio per cui è stato candidato iCarly.

programme.title: iCarly: Carly va in Giappone - parte 3
programme.desc: Spencer e la Sig.ra Benson trovano i ragazzi e li riportano a Tokyo, dove lo spettacolo degli iWeb Awards è già cominciato. Le guardie di sicurezza però non vogliono farli entrare.

programme.title: iCarly: L'ho visto prima io!
programme.desc: Freddie ha invitato un amico all'iCarly show e sia Carly che Sam si prendono una cotta per lui appena il nuovo ragazzo entra nello studio.

programme.title: iCarly: La partita infinita
programme.desc: Spencer trova in una discarica un vecchio videogioco e da quando comincia a giocarci, non riesce più a staccarsi.

programme.title: Un amore da ricordare
programme.desc: Tenley trova finalmente il coraggio di incontrare dal vivo Jared, conosciuto online un anno prima. Quando questi ha un incidente, l'ospedale fa firmare i documenti a Tenley, facendo credere alla famiglia di Jared che i due siano sposati.

programme.title: Una luna di miele da sogno
programme.sub-title: Una luna di miele da sogno
programme.desc: Quando il fidanzato di Ava la lascia all'altare, lei è determinata a godersi la luna di miele senza di lui. Il tempo lontano la aiuta a capire cosa vuole veramente, ma quando il suo fidanzato si presenta, è più confusa che mai.

programme.title: Sempre nel mio cuore
programme.desc: Jenna e Charlie hanno trovato l'amore in Irlanda ma i loro sogni li hanno separati. Cinque anni dopo, si riuniscono e Jenna deve decidere a chi appartiene il suo cuore: a casa o sull'Isola di Smeraldo.

programme.title: L'anello perfetto
programme.desc: Proprietaria di una gioielleria, Kate disegna anelli di fidanzamento e fedi nuziali. Quando, un giorno, rivede il suo primo amore Jaimie, questi le offre di lavorare come stilista di gioielli in una grande casa di oreficeria.

programme.title: Sposami a Natale
programme.desc: Durante i preparativi per una cerimonia natalizia molto importante e sofisticata, Madaline Krug, un'organizzatrice di matrimoni, si innamora inaspettatamente del fratello della sposa.

programme.title: Un bianco Natale
programme.desc: Kelly Mitchum torna a casa per trascorrere il Natale con la sua famiglia. Mentre sogna di trovare il suo uomo perfetto, incontra il l'imprenditore Forrest Newell. Ora, con la casa della sua famiglia a rischio di demolizione, Forrest può aiutarla?

programme.title: Batticuore
programme.desc: La podcaster Samantha Desouza è incaricata di ospitare uno show per riunire gli amori perduti. Anche se l'amore è l'ultima cosa nella sua mente, Samantha si innamora dell'affascinante Jake. Questa volta Samantha seguirà il suo cuore?

programme.title: Amore a Cedar Creek
programme.desc: Allison Sawyer è una giornalista che scrive del suo autore preferito che ha basato tutti i suoi romanzi sul bellissimo Clybourne Ranch. Lì incontra Hank che gestisce il posto da anni. Mentre Allison scrive, diventa anche molto più vicina a Hank...

programme.title: Un amore di damigella
programme.desc: CATE, recentemente separatasi, sta aiutando con il matrimonio de la sua migliore amica MAXINE. È sorpresa di vedere il fratello di Maxine, MATT, che è in città. Mentre la coppia si avvicina, le vecchie fiamme ritornano: Cate seguirà il suo cuore?

programme.title: Una corona per due
programme.desc: Quando il fidanzato di Riley, Mandla, la invita in Sudafrica per conoscere la sua famiglia, lei rimane scioccata nello scoprire che lui è un principe. La notizia mette in pericolo la fiducia di Riley in Mandla.

programme.title: La miliardaria
programme.desc: Epifania ha ereditato da suo padre una fortuna favolosa e un consiglio sul tipo di uomo da sposare. Lei, invece, si sposa senza seguire il consiglio di suo padre, ma il matrimonio si rivela un fallimento.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tårarnas matematik
programme.desc: Andromeda upptäcker sitt systerskepp Pax Magellanic. Besättningen ombord på Pax är 300 år gammal... men har inte åldrats en dag.

programme.title: Andromeda: Musik från en avlägsen trumma
programme.desc: Tyr kraschlandar Eureka Maru på en Nietzscheansk planet och får minnesförlust. Han måste komma ihåg vad han gör innan nietzscheanerna upptäcker honom och hans låda med stöldgods.

programme.title: Andromeda: Harper 2.0
programme.desc: Harper får kunskapens gåva från en döende perseid, men upptäcker att perseiden var eftersökt av en prisjägare som nu har riktat sin uppmärksamhet mot Harper.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tvångsperspektiv
programme.desc: Dylan arresteras för att ha mördat en diktator för 300 år sedan.

programme.title: Andromeda: Summan av dess delar
programme.desc: Andromeda bordas av en drönare från Consensus of Parts, ett mytiskt mekaniskt samhälle. Drönaren är vänlig till en början, men försöker tvinga skeppet att ansluta sig till Consensus.

programme.title: Andromeda: Skräck och avsky i Vintergatan
programme.desc: Gerentex är tillbaka och han kräver att Trance och Harper hjälper honom med sin nya plan: att hitta Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Andromeda: Djävulen tar det sista
programme.desc: Dylan och Rev Bem hjälper ett fredligt samhälle att stå upp mot sina slavhandlare, men de måste vara försiktiga: om Dylan lär dem att döda kommer deras barn att födas med vetskap om det.

programme.title: Andromeda: Honungsoffer
programme.desc: Dylan försöker bringa fred mellan två olika Nietzscheanska stolta samhällen genom att eskortera prinsessan i det ena landet till sitt arrangerade bröllop med prinsen i det andra landet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stjärnkorsad
programme.desc: Rommies avatar blir förälskad i vad som visar sig vara avataren av ett krigsfartyg som heter Gabriel. Gabriel försöker smitta Rommie med ett virus som sänder sina planer till krigsfartyget.

programme.title: Andromeda: Det är ett vackert ljus

programme.title: Andromeda: Dess timme har äntligen kommit
programme.desc: Ett gammalt minne från Andromeda aktiveras av misstag, vilket skickar henne på ett uppdrag och gör att Dylan och besättningen inte kan åsidosätta kommandot.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den växande strömmen

programme.title: Andromeda: Utgång strategier

programme.desc: Besättningen måste stjäla en juvel som står i centrum för en fejd mellan en Drift-ägare och Than. Beka faller för en säkerhetschef som tidigare var tjuv.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl disappears from a remote Alaska town, investigators wonder if she has been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods. Eventually, they realize that neither assumption is true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in your Eyes
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, police have no idea who is responsible. A 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label ead investigators to the man who made the bomb.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, police have no idea who is responsible. A 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label ead investigators to the man who made the bomb.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: No one in a quiet residential community saw anything unusual the day one of their neighbors was brutally attacked and murdered. Fingerprints found at the crime scene and surveillance video helped investigators to apprehend the presumed killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: No one in a quiet residential community saw anything unusual the day one of their neighbors was brutally attacked and murdered. Fingerprints found at the crime scene and surveillance video helped investigators to apprehend the presumed killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another seriously wounded. Cell phone calls and shell casings point to a suspect, but authorities are unable to place him at the crime scene. A forensic geologist proves that dirt is anything but dumb.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When Rosemary Anderson is found dead on the side of the road, her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man: serial killer Eric Edgar Cooke.

programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine motorcade for the Queen of England. But on the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupts in Kings Cross Station in London, killing 31 people and injuring dozens more. Investigators pinpoint the cause of the fire, but it takes state-of-the-art technology and fluid dynamics experts to explain why it became a deadly inferno.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage

programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident — until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: An Alaskan police officer finds a woman's body while on routine patrol of a public park. During the autopsy, the medical examiner preserves the portion of her rib cage which sustained the fatal wound.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delicti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.
